description: A monochrome or muted-tone view of the Janskerk (St. John's Church) in Gouda, the Netherlands. The Gothic church dominates the composition with its large pointed arch windows, stepped gable, and a slender bell tower topped with a weathervane. A smaller house with a white-washed facade nestles at the church's base. Several small figures walk in the foreground square. Trees frame the right side. The rendering is detailed and atmospheric, capturing the aged stonework and the quiet life around the church.
